---
title: "fromWebSocketWithOptions()"
description: "Emit WebSocket events using a caller-supplied request object."
---

<!-- generated by website/scripts/gen-api-docs.mjs; do not edit -->

Emit WebSocket events using a caller-supplied request object.

## Import

```ts
import { fromWebSocketWithOptions } from "@graphrefly/ts/sources";
```

## Signature

```ts
function fromWebSocketWithOptions(request: WebSocketRequest): Operator<never, WebSocketEvent>
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `request` | `WebSocketRequest` | WebSocket request details. |

## Returns

A source operator that emits connection, message, and close events.

## Example

```ts
fromWebSocketWithOptions({ url: "wss://example.com/socket" });
```

## Source

`packages/ts/src/graph/sources.ts`
